title: Nexus PatchWorldKbRelationshipResponse
description: Success response for POST /v1/local/worlds/{world_id}/kb/patch-relationship (V1.74). Returns the committed relationship projection (absent on remove), the new per-row version, and validation diagnostics.

relationship.description: Canonical projection of the row after the patch. Null/absent for remove.

version.description: New per-row version after the patch was persisted.
